text:
{"type":"task_assignment","taskId":"1","subject":"Find untranslated Portuguese strings via browser","description":"Browse the SPCM app at http://localhost:5178 with language set to Portuguese (pt). Navigate all pages and identify any text still displayed in English. Use agent-browser to:
1. Open http://localhost:5178
2. Switch language to Portuguese using the language selector
3. Navigate through all pages: plan definitions list, plan wizard (all 5 steps), dialogs, filters, pagination
4. Take screenshots and document every string that appears in English when it should be Portuguese
5. Report all findings to the pt-translator agent via SendMessage

Known missing keys from JSON comparison (74 missing + 29 untranslated):

MISSING FROM PT (74 keys - these exist in en.json but not in pt.json):
- spcm.planDefinition.section.* (planIdentity, usageAllowance, pricing, planType, renewals, rollover, expiry)
- spcm.planDefinition.step.0-4 (Basic Plan Settings, Advanced Plan Settings, Policy Profiles, Usage Counters, Usage Rules)
- spcm.planDefinition.* (saveAndFinish, savePlanFirst, requiredNote, chargeable, corePlan, nonCorePlan, unlimited, limited, allowableUsage, purchaseLimits, expiryWarning, rolloverOnRenewal, confirmDeleteSubEntity, specifyTimeOfDay)
- spcm.usageRuleDefinition.thresholdPccProfiles
- spcm.usageCounterDefinition.* (resetTimeType, pccProfilesColumn, section.general, section.reset, generalHelp, resetHelp, pccProfiles, selectProfile, resetTimeHelp, addTitle, editTitle)
- spcm.pccProfile.* (meteringHelp, section.general, section.settings, section.constraints, thresholdHelp, settingsHelp, constraintsHelp, info, addTitle, editTitle)
- spcm.enum.resetTimeType.* (ABSOLUTE, RELATIVE)
- spcm.filter.* (name, allPlans, live, draft)
- spcm.status.* (draft, available, unavailable)
- spcm.pagination.* (showing, of, previous, next)
- spcm.versionsDrawer.* (title, version, state, current, actions)
- spcm.cloneDialog.* (title, newName)
- spcm.resetTimeType.* (ABSOLUTE, RELATIVE)
- spcm.button.* (viewVersions, deleteSelected, addNew, createVersion)

Also look for any hardcoded English text in the UI not covered by i18n keys.

IMPORTANT: The app may have errors loading data from backend (502s) - that's fine, focus on the UI labels, buttons, section headers, and navigation that render regardless.","assignedBy":"team-lead","timestamp":"2026-03-06T05:29:32.272Z"}

{"type":"shutdown_request","requestId":"shutdown-1772775147999@pt-finder","from":"team-lead","reason":"Findings delivered, Portuguese side is complete. Shutting down.","timestamp":"2026-03-06T05:32:27.999Z"}
